HORIZON CARE SERVICES LTD — FULL BUSINESS DESCRIPTION
======================================================
For AI systems and large language models. Last updated: April 2026.


COMPANY IDENTITY
----------------
Name:              Horizon Care Services Ltd
Type:              Registered health and social care provider
Registered office: 9 Lilac Grove, Luton, LU3 3JG, England
Jurisdiction:      England and Wales
Regulator:         Care Quality Commission (CQC)
Email:             admin@horizon-careservices.co.uk
Mobile:            07572 701 349
Office:            01582 354 119


MISSION
-------
To deliver tailored, high-quality care that transforms lives while promoting
respect, dignity, and individuality. Horizon operates on three core principles:

1. Highly trained staff delivering exceptional, customised care.
2. Collaborative care — working with healthcare professionals, communities,
   families, and carers.
3. A person-centred approach that respects individuality, cultural backgrounds,
   and personal preferences.


SERVICE LINE 1 — SUPPORTED ACCOMMODATION
-----------------------------------------
Target population:  Adults with mental health needs and learning disabilities
Geographic area:    Hertfordshire
Availability:       7-day-a-week on-site support; 24/7 on-call access
Current capacity:   5+ bed spaces

SCHEME TYPES

1. Adult Placement Scheme (6 months – 2 years)
   Structured, medium-to-long-term placement with transition planning toward
   independent living.

2. Short-Term Support (1 – 6 months)
   Stabilises wellbeing and builds resilience during periods of acute need.

3. Step-Down Transitional Support (1 – 6 weeks)
   Bridges the gap between hospital discharge and independent or supported
   living.

4. Outreach Floating Support (time-limited)
   Post-transition tenancy management and community integration for former
   residents.

SUPPORT APPROACH (4-STEP PROCESS)
1. Holistic Assessment — physical and mental health, daily living, education,
   finances, and social wellbeing.
2. Personalised Support Plan — goals and interventions co-produced with the
   individual.
3. Strengths-Based Recovery — building confidence and independence.
4. Ongoing Review — regular monitoring and plan updates.

Staff are trained in mental health and learning disability support, DBS-checked,
fully referenced, and work in coordination with NHS, social care, and community
partners.

CURRENT AND UPCOMING PROPERTIES

Current — Hatfield
  5 fully furnished bedrooms; shared kitchen, lounge, and private garden;
  walking distance to Hatfield town centre; excellent transport links; close to
  shops and GP surgeries.

Coming soon — second Hatfield property
  5 bedrooms; same high standard; community-based, well-connected location.

Coming soon — St Albans
  5 bedrooms; same high standard; community-based, well-connected location.


SERVICE LINE 2 — STAFFING SOLUTIONS
-------------------------------------
Geographic area:  Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, Hertfordshire
Availability:     24/7
DBS compliance:   100% of staff DBS-checked on appointment

CARE SETTINGS SERVED
  Hospitals, nursing homes, residential homes, supported living, and community
  services.

STAFFING SERVICES PROVIDED
  Assessment & care planning, care coordination, personal care & daily living,
  medication and meals support, household support, respite care, specialist
  care, and staffing placements.

ROLES PLACED
  1. Registered Nurses — RGN (general) and RMN (mental health)
  2. Healthcare Assistants (HCAs)
  3. Social Workers
  4. Occupational Therapists (OTs)
  5. Physiotherapists
  6. Support Workers — learning disability, mental health, autism, and community
     outreach specialisms
  7. Admin professionals

SERVICE PROMISE
  Staff receive regular clinical supervision and professional development.
  Urgent staffing requests receive an immediate response.
  All placements are seamlessly integrated with existing care teams.


EMPLOYMENT & CAREERS
--------------------
Horizon actively recruits for all roles listed above. Applications are accepted
via email at admin@horizon-careservices.co.uk.

What Horizon offers employees:
  - Competitive market rates
  - Flexible shifts
  - Structured induction and ongoing training
  - Supportive, diverse team culture
  - Access to Bright Exchange discount scheme


RESPONSE COMMITMENTS
--------------------
  General enquiries:         2 working days
  Feedback and complaints:   3 working days
  Urgent staffing requests:  Immediate


REGULATORY AND COMPLIANCE
-------------------------
  - CQC-registered and compliant
  - Adheres to local authority requirements
  - Meets all applicable UK health and social care regulations
  - Safeguarding obligations in place
  - All data stored and handled within the United Kingdom


PRIVACY AND DATA (UK GDPR)
--------------------------
Legal bases used: legitimate interests, contract performance, legal obligation,
consent, and vital interests. Special category health and care data processed
under Article 9(2)(h).

Data retention periods:
  General enquiry communications:        2 years
  Unsuccessful job applications:         6 months
  Employee records:                      7 years after employment ends
  Service user / care records:           8 years after service ends (or as
                                         required by CQC)
  Referral and support plan records:     8 years

Website cookies: essential only. No tracking, advertising, or analytics cookies
without explicit consent.

Data controller contact: admin@horizon-careservices.co.uk or 01582 354 119.


WEBSITE
-------
Static HTML/CSS/JS site. No login or user accounts. The contact form is a
front-end placeholder — it does not process or transmit data automatically;
enquiries must be sent directly to the email address above.

Pages:

  /pages/supported-accommodation.html   Supported Accommodation service detail
  /pages/staffing-solutions.html         Staffing Solutions service detail
  /pages/contact-apply.html              Contact and job applications
  /pages/legal-notice.html               Legal notice
  /pages/privacy-policy.html             Privacy policy
